rating_calculation.sentiment_rationale: Multiple recordings uniformly praise the performance ‚Äì soaring guitar, tight rhythm section, and standout transitions (Sugar‚ÜíScarlet, Sugar‚ÜíScarlet‚ÜíMan Smart‚ÜíEyes). No consistent negative comments about playing; only minor set‚Äëlist hiccups noted. This strong positive consensus merits a high sentiment boost.

best_recording.reason: Excellent soundboard capture with crisp, well‚Äëbalanced mix; highlights flawless transitions and the band‚Äôs energy without noticeable dropouts.

band_performance.Jerry: Soaring lead work and a blazing tone all night; reviewers rave about his "Jerry Lives!" energy.
band_performance.Phil: Aggressive, melodic bass lines that drive the second set; highlighted as especially strong on the latter half.
band_performance.Bob: No notable praise beyond a brief comment on a whiny Fantasy/Jude segue; otherwise unremarkable in reviews.
band_performance.Brent: Glowing accolades as the best keyboardist ever; standout contributions on Memphis Blues, Dear Mr. Fantasy and throughout the second set.
